S2 }} '''[https://www.instagram.com/theesportsclub/ The Esports Club]''' in association with '''[https://www.instagram.com/ultragear_gaming/ LG Ultragear]''' present the third season of the BGMI invitational tournament ''TEC BGMI Invitational'' called the '''''TEC BGMI Invitational Season 3''''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Fritzz |b2=Auro|b2link=Auro (Indian Commentator) |b3=Spero |b4=SardarjiYT|b4name=Harshdeep Singh|b4flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''BGMI Invitational Season 3:''' 24th March 2022 to 29th March 2022.'' * ''18 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]'' * ''15 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days.'' * ''3 Matches to be played each day.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays: 3 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''24th March''''': ''(E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''25th March''''': ''(M>>E>>M)'' ** '''''26th March''''': ''(E>>M>>E)'' ** '''''27th March''''': ''(M>>E>>M)'' ** '''''29th March''''': ''(E>>M>>E)'' ====Points Distribution==== {{MatchScoringPointsTable|showtiebreaker=false|killterm=finish |{{Json|place=1|points=15|place2=6 |points2=4}} |{{Json|place=2|points=12|place2=7 |points2=2}} |{{Json|place=3|points=10|place2=8-12 |points2=1}} |{{Json|place=4|points=8 |place2=13-18|points2=0}} |{{Json|place=5|points=6 }} }} ==Prize Pool== ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $6610 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
